infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need your location to help you set your work area and find nearby jobs.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: We use your photo library only when you choose an image to upload, such as selecting a profile photo, business photo, or identity document image for your 100Handy account.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: We use your photo library only when you choose an image to upload, such as selecting a profile photo, business photo, or identity document image for your 100Handy account.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: We use your camera so you can take profile photos, business photos, and identity document photos for your 100Handy account.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: We need your location to help you set your work area and find nearby jobs.
